name: Pork in Plum Sauce (Mwei Jiong Yoke) - Canton
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into bite-size pieces.
2. Peel carrots and cut them into cubes.
3. Heat oil in a wok, add garlic, and stir-fry until fragrant.
4. Add the pork to the wok and cook on high heat until browned, stirring occasionally.
5. Add plum sauce, celery, ginger, sherry, carrots, sugar, salt, and scallions with water. Stir to combine.
6. Simmer the mixture covered for 12 minutes.
7. Mix cornstarch with water in a separate bowl.
8. Pour the cornstarch-water mixture into the wok and stir until the sauce thickens.
